title: moenchia erecta var. octandra
intro: Moenchia erecta var. octandra, also known as Octandra or Spiked Moenchia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Moenchia erecta var. octandra include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also dried and used in capsules or powders.
